reviews.comment:
Me detengo en esta estación porque es la primera viniendo de BB. Pero, la verdad no voy a volver.. 09:30 de la mañana y no hay facturas.. Una solo cajera que hace todo.. Cola interminable de gente esperando pedir.. Los precios son de terror.. Realmente para el olvido esta estación.. Creo que no es YPF Full  y se nota..

(Translated by Google)
I stopped at this station because it's the first one coming from BB. But honestly, I'm not coming back. It's 9:30 in the morning and they don't have any receipts. There's only one cashier doing everything. An endless line of people waiting to order. The prices are outrageous. This station is truly forgettable. I don't think it's a YPF Full, and it shows.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJNU43c1Z3EAE
